title: Arkansas Association of Disability Examiners (ARKADE) — Constitution and Bylaws
description: Governing document of the Arkansas Association of Disability Examiners (ARKADE), a Southwest Region chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Part I is the Constitution (name, relationships, definitions, purposes, membership, meetings, governing body of President/President-Elect/Secretary-Treasurer plus two members-at-large, committees, parliamentary authority, bylaws, amendments) and Part II is the Bylaws (definitions, two classes of membership, quarterly meetings, administration and officer duties, board of directors, program committee, amendments). Both parts were ratified by the members on June 29, 1979.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Arkansas Chapter
source.title: Constitution and Bylaws of the Arkansas Association of Disability Examiners (ARKADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Arkansas-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect minor conversion artifacts. Both the Constitution and the Bylaws carry 'RATIFIED BY THE MEMBERS Date: June 29, 1979', so temporal_coverage start/end are both set to 1979. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link to this specific document.
